best_for: Whole life, high-net-worth coverage, financial planning
perks: Highest financial strength ratings across all major agencies
Whole life dividends paid since 1872 without interruption
Permanent life builds significant cash value over time
Integrated financial planning approach through advisors
Very high coverage amounts available for high-net-worth clients
Flexible rider options for comprehensive protection
drawbacks: Requires working through a financial advisor, no online-only option
Whole and universal life premiums significantly higher than term
No no-medical-exam option; full underwriting required
Process can be slow compared to digital-first carriers
